documentation.title: Disallow Use Const
documentation.standard: Disallow the use of `use const` import statements, with or without alias.

code.title: Valid: Other type of use import statements.

code_comparison.code: use const _PhpScoperdd275a4cd119\Vendor\Sub\CONST; use const _PhpScoperdd275a4cd119\Vendor\Sub\BAR as otherConst;
